headline: Philip Morris International Joins Ferrari Hypersail as Principal Partner, Building on 50-Year Relationship
summary: STAMFORD, CT, April 13, 2026--Philip Morris International (NYSE: PM) today announced it will serve as Principal Partner of Ferrari Hypersail, an initiative that applies Ferrari engineering and racing spirit to a new frontier at sea. PMI has shared with Ferrari one of the most enduring partnerships in Formula 1 since its origins in 1973 - a relationship defined by reinvention, ambition, and an unwavering belief that progress matters. headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Brush Off
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
